User.title: User
User.description: A user of the VoiceForge AI platform.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

Voice.title: Voice
Voice.description: A voice model available for text-to-speech.

sampleUrl.description: A URL to a sample audio file.

userId.description: The ID of the user who cloned this voice. Null if it's a public voice.

isPublic.description: Whether this voice is available to all users.

Generation.title: Generation
Generation.description: A record of a generated voice audio.

userId.description: The ID of the user who generated the audio.

text.description: The text that was converted to speech.

voiceId.description: The ID of the voice used.

outputData.description: The base64 encoded audio data, or 'CHUNKED' if too large.

chunkCount.description: The number of chunks if outputData is 'CHUNKED'.

GenerationChunk.title: GenerationChunk
GenerationChunk.description: A chunk of base64 audio data.

userId.description: The user who owns this chunk.

data.description: The base64 encoded audio data chunk.

/voices/{voiceId}.description: Stores available voices and user-cloned voices.

/generations/{generationId}/chunks/{chun.description: Stores chunks of generated audio data.
